front: Como monitoramos a saúde do sistema em produção?
pronunciation: KOH-moo moo-nee-too-RAH-moos ah sah-OO-jee doo sees-TEH-mah ahyng proo-doo-SOHNG?
back: How do we monitor the system health in production?
context: Querying operational observability workflows using 'saúde do sistema'.

front: Eu estou configurando alertas para picos de latência.
pronunciation: ew ees-TOY coohn-fee-goo-RAHN-doo ah-LEHR-tahs PAH-rah PEE-koos jee lah-TEHNG-syah.
back: I am configuring alerts for latency spikes.
context: Describing proactive monitoring thresholds using 'picos de latência'.

front: O relatório de incidentes está disponível no painel de controle.
pronunciation: oo heh-lah-TOO-ryoo jee eeyns-ee-DEHN-chees ees-TAH dees-poo-nee-VEH noo py-NEHW jee coohn-TROH-lee.
back: The incident report is available on the dashboard.
context: Accessing post-mortem documentation via 'relatório de incidentes'.

front: Precisamos aplicar patches de segurança imediatamente.
pronunciation: preh-see-SAH-moos ah-plee-KAHR patches jee seh-goo-RAH-sah ee-meh-jee-ah-tah-MEHN-chee.
back: We need to apply security patches immediately.
context: Enforcing urgent system hardening protocols.

front: Eu fiz um backup completo dos dados antes da manutenção.
pronunciation: ew fees oong backup coohm-PLEH-too dooz DAH-doos AHN-chees dah mah-noo-tehn-SOHNG.
back: I made a complete backup of the data before the maintenance.
context: Ensuring data integrity during risky system updates.

front: A latência da rede aumentou após o último deploy.
pronunciation: ah lah-TEHNG-syah dah HEH-jee ow-mehn-TOY ah-POH-z oo OOW-chee-moo deploy.
back: The network latency increased after the last deploy.
context: Analyzing deployment-related performance regressions.

front: Como posso verificar o log de acessos do servidor?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo veh-ree-fee-KAHR oo log jee ah-SEH-soos doo sehr-vee-DOHR?
back: How can I check the server access log?
context: Requesting audit trail visibility for security monitoring.

front: O tráfego de usuários está sobrecarregando o servidor.
pronunciation: oo TRAH-feh-goo jee oo-zoo-AH-ryoos ees-TAH SOH-bree-kah-heh-GAHN-doo oo sehr-vee-DOHR.
back: User traffic is overloading the server.
context: Diagnosing capacity saturation issues via 'tráfego de usuários'.

front: Eu estou documentando os passos para a recuperação do sistema.
pronunciation: ew ees-TOY doo-koo-mehn-TAHN-doo ooz PAHS-oos PAH-rah ah heh-koo-peh-rah-SOHNG doo sees-TEH-mah.
back: I am documenting the steps for system recovery.
context: Drafting disaster recovery playbooks using 'recuperação do sistema'.

front: A integridade dos arquivos foi comprometida durante a transferência.
pronunciation: ah eeyng-teh-gree-DAH-jee dooz ahr-KEE-voos foy coohm-proo-meh-chee-DAH doo-RAHN-chee ah trahns-feh-REHN-syah.
back: The integrity of the files was compromised during the transfer.
context: Reporting corruption issues in asset pipeline workflows.

front: Eu uso ferramentas de monitoramento para ver erros em tempo real.
pronunciation: ew OO-zoo feh-hah-MEHN-tahs jee moo-nee-too-rah-MEHN-too PAH-rah vehr EH-hoos ahyng TEHMP-oo heh-AW.
back: I use monitoring tools to see errors in real-time.
context: Leveraging observability stack tools for 'tempo real' monitoring.

front: O firewall bloqueou uma tentativa suspeita de invasão.
pronunciation: oo firewall bloo-keh-OY OO-mah tehn-tah-CHEE-vah soos-PAY-tah jee eeyng-vah-ZOHNG.
back: The firewall blocked a suspicious intrusion attempt.
context: Reporting on proactive security threat mitigation.

front: Como posso realizar um roll-back para a versão anterior?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo heh-ah-lee-ZAHR oong roll-back PAH-rah ah vehr-SOHNG ahn-teh-ry-OHR?
back: How can I perform a roll-back to the previous version?
context: Inquiring about stable state restoration workflows.

front: Precisamos agendar uma reunião para revisar os logs de erros.
pronunciation: preh-see-SAH-moos ah-zhehn-DAHR OO-mah heh-oo-nee-AOHNG PAH-rah heh-vee-ZAHR ooz logs jee EH-hoos.
back: We need to schedule a meeting to review error logs.
context: Coordinating team analysis sessions via 'revisar os logs'.

front: A política de senhas foi atualizada para aumentar a segurança.
pronunciation: ah poo-LEE-chee-kah jee SEH-nyahs foy ah-too-ah-lee-ZAH-dah PAH-rah ow-mehn-TAHR ah seh-goo-RAH-sah.
back: The password policy was updated to increase security.
context: Updating access control standards via 'política de senhas'.

front: Eu estou limpando os logs antigos para liberar espaço no disco.
pronunciation: ew ees-TOY leeym-PAHN-doo ooz logs ahn-CHEE-goos PAH-rah lee-beh-RAHR ehs-PAH-soo noo DEES-koo.
back: I am clearing old logs to free up disk space.
context: Performing routine server maintenance using 'liberar espaço'.

front: A aplicação está lenta devido ao alto consumo de memória.
pronunciation: ah ah-plee-kah-SOHNG ees-TAH LEHN-tah jee-VEE-doo ow AW-too coohn-SOO-moo jee meh-MOH-ryah.
back: The application is slow due to high memory consumption.
context: Diagnosing application performance degradation causes.

front: Eu validei a assinatura digital do pacote de instalação.
pronunciation: ew vah-lee-DAY ah ah-see-nah-TOO-rah jee-zhee-TAW doo pah-KOH-chee jee eeyns-tah-lah-SOHNG.
back: I validated the digital signature of the installation package.
context: Ensuring secure supply chain software delivery.

front: O sistema de cache está causando inconsistência nos dados.
pronunciation: oo sees-TEH-mah jee cache ees-TAH cow-ZAHN-doo eeyng-coohn-sees-TEH-syah nooz DAH-doos.
back: The cache system is causing data inconsistency.
context: Troubleshooting state synchronization logic bugs.

front: Como posso otimizar a conexão com o banco de dados?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo oo-chee-mee-ZAHR ah coohn-eh-KWAH-SOHNG coong oo BAHN-koo jee DAH-doos?
back: How can I optimize the connection with the database?
context: Requesting database access and performance tuning tips.

front: Eu instalei uma ferramenta para rastrear falhas no código.
pronunciation: ew eeyns-tah-LAY OO-mah feh-hah-MEHN-tah PAH-rah rahs-treh-AHR FAH-lyahs noo KOH-jee-go.
back: I installed a tool to track errors in the code.
context: Setting up error tracking and observability stacks.

front: Precisamos restringir o acesso a essa pasta confidencial.
pronunciation: preh-see-SAH-moos hehs-treeyng-ZHEER oo ah-SEH-soo ah EHS-ah PAHS-tah coohn-fee-dehyng-SYAW.
back: We need to restrict access to this confidential folder.
context: Securing sensitive file locations using access control.

front: O tempo de resposta da API melhorou após o ajuste.
pronunciation: oo TEHMP-oo jee heh-SPOHS-tah dah API meh-lyo-ROY ah-POH-z oo ah-ZHOOS-chee.
back: The API response time improved after the adjustment.
context: Confirming performance benchmarks via 'tempo de resposta'.

front: Eu preciso testar a resiliência do sistema com alta carga.
pronunciation: ew prah-SEE-zoo tehs-TAHR ah heh-zee-lee-EHN-syah doo sees-TEH-mah coong AW-tah KAHR-gah.
back: I need to test the system resilience under high load.
context: Performing stress tests via 'alta carga'.

front: O painel de monitoramento mostra uma queda de tráfego.
pronunciation: oo py-NEHW jee moo-nee-too-rah-MEHN-too MOHS-trah OO-mah KEH-dah jee TRAH-feh-goo.
back: The monitoring dashboard shows a traffic drop.
context: Identifying anomaly patterns using the visual dashboard.

front: Eu configurei notificações para erros críticos de sistema.
pronunciation: ew coohn-fee-goo-RAY noo-chee-fee-kah-SOHNGS PAH-rah EH-hoos KREE-chee-koos jee sees-TEH-mah.
back: I configured notifications for critical system errors.
context: Setting up alert routing for high-priority incidents.

front: Como posso garantir que o deploy não quebre nada?
pronunciation: KOH-moo POH-soo gah-RAHN-chee kee oo deploy nohng KEH-bree NAH-dah?
back: How can I ensure that the deploy doesn't break anything?
context: Querying safety protocols to prevent production outages.

front: Eu preciso renovar o certificado de segurança do servidor.
pronunciation: ew prah-SEE-zoo heh-noo-VAHR oo sehr-chee-fee-KAH-doo jee seh-goo-RAH-sah doo sehr-vee-DOHR.
back: I need to renew the server's security certificate.
context: Performing routine security infrastructure management tasks.

front: A migração dos dados foi feita com sucesso total.
pronunciation: ah mee-grah-SOHNG dooz DAH-doos foy FAY-tah coong soo-SEHS-oo toh-TAW.
back: The data migration was done with total success.
context: Confirming completion of critical structural data tasks.

front: O sistema de logs ajuda a auditar quem acessou o arquivo.
pronunciation: oo sees-TEH-mah jee logs ah-ZHOO-dah ah ow-jee-TAHR kehyng ah-seh-SOY oo ahr-KEE-vew.
back: The log system helps to audit who accessed the file.
context: Discussing compliance and security auditing practices.

front: Eu otimizei a indexação do banco de dados para mais velocidade.
pronunciation: ew oo-chee-mee-ZAY ah eeyng-deh-kah-SOHNG doo BAHN-koo jee DAH-doos PAH-rah mays veh-loo-see-DAH-jee.
back: I optimized the database indexing for more speed.
context: Implementing performance gains via database schema tuning.

front: Precisamos de um plano de contingência para falhas de energia.
pronunciation: preh-see-SAH-moos jee oong PLAH-noo jee coohn-chee-N-ZHEH-syah PAH-rah FAH-lyahs jee eh-nehr-ZHEE-ah.
back: We need a contingency plan for power failures.
context: Developing business continuity planning (BCP) structures.

front: O desenvolvedor corrigiu o bug de segurança na última versão.
pronunciation: oo jeh-zehn-vowl-vee-DOHR coohr-hee-ZHEEW oo bug jee seh-goo-RAH-sah nah OOW-chee-mah vehr-SOHNG.
back: The developer fixed the security bug in the latest version.
context: Tracking patch release outcomes via 'desenvolvedor'.

front: Eu prefiro usar automação para verificar a qualidade do código.
pronunciation: ew preh-FEE-roo oo-ZAHR ow-too-mah-SOHNG PAH-rah veh-ree-fee-KAHR ah kwah-lee-DAH-jee doo KOH-jee-go.
back: I prefer to use automation to verify code quality.
context: Adopting CI/CD automated quality gates.

front: Estamos prontos para subir o patch de segurança para produção.
pronunciation: ees-TAH-moos PROHN-toos PAH-rah soo-BEE oo patch jee seh-goo-RAH-sah PAH-rah proo-doo-SOHNG.
back: We are ready to push the security patch to production.
context: Declaring final readiness for critical hotfix deployment.
